title: Orphan Branch — Unrelated History
description: You need to create a `gh-pages` branch for publishing documentation. This branch must have no commit history shared with `main` — it's a completely fresh start within the same repository.
objective: A branch named `gh-pages` must exist with its own independent root commit (no common ancestor with `main`). The branch must contain an `index.html` file. The `gh-pages` branch must have exactly one commit. `main` must be unchanged.
hints: `git checkout --orphan gh-pages` creates a branch with no parent commits.
After checking out the orphan branch, the index still has files from `main`. Clear the staged tree (for example, `git rm -rf .`) before making the first commit.
An orphan branch's first commit becomes a root commit with no parent.
